result.reasoning: From the tool call history step_1, the FAO PDF analysis extracted Brazil 2020 forest area as 497.2 million hectares and Canada 2020 forest area as 347.0 million hectares. The difference is calculated as 497.2 - 347.0 = 150.2 million hectares. Since the question asks "how many more millions of hectares in Brazil than in Canada", the answer is 150.2.
